message:
bd-2wds9: audit verifications for symbol_cancel.rs and actor.rs

Both verified SOUND. Agent claimed TOCTOU races in symbol_cancel.rs
but code uses correct RwLock+SeqCst serialization pattern per comments.
Agent claimed 7 bugs in actor.rs but all are documented design choices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
